content: We can reframe Self-Refine’s iterative self-feedback framework as a base structure to instantiate multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, turning a single-threaded refinement loop into a divergent-convergent self-improvement cycle. In this hybrid approach, the LLM first generates inconsistent problem-solving perspectives (from self-reflection mechanism research) before feeding all distinct outputs into the Self-Refine iterative loop, selecting the highest-quality output after multiple rounds of self-feedback.
